sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12351" key="a)pogko/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπογκ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n12351.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stuff,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χόρτῳ</foreign> dub.l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.30</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπ-</foreign> Nauck).</sense> </entryFree>
